evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: robust data pipelines; data quality assurance; governance compliance; reliable
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour: emphasis on robustness, reliability, and governance with no velocity signals.
evidence.domain_risk: energy sector; data lake; generative AI
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Energy/utilities with AI initiatives—moderately risky but without explicit compliance/financial framing.
evidence.collaboration_width: data science team; automation; cloud infrastructure; infrastructure teams; product teams; business teams
evidence.data_team_maturity: Steam Data Lake platform; established governance; technology debt reduction; multiple specialized roles
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mature: named platform (Steam Data Lake), governance requirements, and multiple specialized teams indicate established infrastructure.
evidence.jd_authorship: design, build and maintain robust data pipelines; Architecture design for database schemas; Dashboard creation using Tableau or Power BI
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific tools (Snowflake, Databricks, Tableau, Power BI, PostgreSQL) and methodologies show partial hiring manager input with recruiter boilerplate.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: data science; automation; infrastructure; internal platform
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Internal data infrastructure serving technical teams.
evidence.autonomy_level: Construction and optimization; Design; Collaborating with cross-functional teams
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Execution: support-oriented collaboration language without strategic direction-setting.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Company contributing to generative AI initiatives but no AI skill expected from candidate.
evidence.testing_framing: Data quality assurance; proactive quality issue identification
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality owned as responsibility but without explicit testing frameworks or tool mention.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: data quality assurance; governance compliance; robust; reliable
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: governance and reliability are concerns but not compliance/regulatory-driven.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Construction and optimization; maintain; reduce technology debt
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Fix/scale: focus on optimizing existing infrastructure and reducing technical debt.
